<!--
Thank you for contributing to MPASdiag! Please fill out the sections below.
Keep the PR focused on a single change where possible.
-->

## Summary

<!-- A clear description of what this PR does and why. -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link any issues this PR closes or relates to, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Maintenance / refactor / CI

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them. Include sample
     commands, datasets, or output figures where relevant. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (passes `ruff check` and `black --check`).
- [ ] Type checks pass (`mypy mpasdiag/`).
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that cover my changes.
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README / docstrings) as needed.
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased".
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
